news.title: Google is now letting users in the US change their Gmail address
news.summary: Users will be able to change their username only once every 12 months. Plus, they won't be able to delete their new email address for that period of time.

news.title: Airbnb is introducing a private car pick-up service
news.summary: Airbnb is partnering with transportation company Welcome Pickups to let users book a private car service during their trip.

news.title: Allbirds is selling for $39 million. It raised nearly 10 times that amount in its IPO.

news.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
news.summary: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

news.summary: SharkNinja has announced a new cleaning tool called the BlastBoss. It looks like a handheld vacuum but functions like a leaf blower with an adjustable air blast that can reach 190 mph.
